name: Caramel Pecan Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the melted butter, graham cracker crumbs, and 2 tablespoons sugar. Press into the bottom of a prepared springform pan.
2. Melt the candy caramels and milk together in a small saucepan over low heat until smooth. Stir in the pecans and spread evenly over the crust.
3. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add 1/2 cup sugar and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract, mixing until well combined. Add the eggs one at a time, stirring gently after each addition.
4. Pour the cheesecake mixture evenly over the caramel layer in the springform pan.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 40 minutes, or until set but slightly jiggly in the center.
6. Turn off the oven and allow the cheesecake to cool completely on a wire rack. Refrigerate for at least 3 hours before serving.
